title: Kuro’s Plan Against Kaya Is Revealed
description: On pages 2–5, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have been working on the same day, and I am not sure if I am not going to be a fan of the game. I am not a fan of the game. I am not a fan of the same guy. I am not going to be able to get a bit of a bit of a bit

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: The special order you placed in the weigh- boring town has arrived, here's the item

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Is there anything else that you will need?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm so sorry that I had you run all the way over there

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You're welcome. I love to be of service!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: I'm sure Clahador will be very happy!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Yes, tomorrow will be Clahador's 3rd year anniversary since he came to this place

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: He takes really good care of me

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
